articles.title: 'She planned it, no he forced me': Twist in Pune realtor murder; Siya & Chetan turn on each other
articles.description: A shocking murder case involving realtor Ketan Agarwal has taken a dramatic turn as his fiancée, Siya Goyal, and her friend, Chetan Chaudhary, reportedly blame each other for his death. Police investigations reveal conflicting accounts, with evidence currently pointing towards Goyal as the alleged mastermind behind the plot. The couple was set to marry later this year.

articles.title: From baby to dog: Miracle rescues giving Venezuela hope after deadly earthquakes - watch
articles.description: Amidst the devastation of twin earthquakes in Venezuela, remarkable rescues are offering glimmers of hope. Emergency workers and citizens are tirelessly searching for survivors beneath collapsed buildings, with a baby and a 12-year-old boy among those miraculously pulled to safety. These uplifting moments contrast sharply with the rising death toll and widespread destruction, as international aid begins to arrive.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi on the verge of breaking Tendulkar's 36-year-old record
articles.description: All eyes are on 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as India faces Ireland in Belfast. The teenage sensation, who had a stellar IPL 2026 season with Rajasthan Royals, could make history as India's youngest male international cricketer if he debuts.  His call-up breaks Sachin Tendulkar's long-standing record, fulfilling a lifelong dream for the young talent.

articles.title: Crude oil stands at $75 as tankers head to Hormuz after four months of chaos
articles.description: Crude oil prices dipped Friday as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz improved, easing supply disruption fears. This comes despite recent tensions after a cargo ship near Oman was struck, with Iran reportedly firing at the vessel. While geopolitical risks linger, oil shipments through the strait have seen an uptick following a ceasefire. Venezuela's oil production may also face challenges due to power outages following recent earthquakes.

articles.title: He failed Class 6, dropped out of school and worked on his father's farm, today, he leads a food company reportedly worth over Rs 4,000 crore
articles.description: PC Musthafa, founder of iD Fresh Food, rose from failing Class 6 and dropping out of school in rural Kerala to building a ?4,000-crore food company. Born into poverty in Wayanad, he worked on farms before a teacher’s intervention motivated him to return to education. He later studied at NIT Calicut and IIM Bangalore, worked abroad, and returned to start a small fresh idli batter business in Bengaluru that grew into a major global brand.
articles.full_text: Sanjay Sharma is a seasoned journalist with over two decades of experience in the media industry. Currently serving as Assistant Editor - Education at TimesofIndia.com, he specializes in education-related content, including board results, job notifications, and studying abroad. Since joining TOI in 2006, he has played a pivotal role in expanding the platformâs digital presence and spearheading major education events. Previously, Sanjay held leadership positions in sports journalism, covering high-profile events such as the Cricket World Cup and Olympics. He holds a PG Diploma in Journalism from Bharatiya Vidya Bhawan and is proficient in various content managementÂ systems. Read More

articles.title: 'Learning Python and working on real projects gave me confidence for my career,' says Uday Kiran Kandagatla, IIT Madras BS learner joining TCS as Systems Engineer
articles.description: Uday Kiran Kandagatla, a learner in the IIT Madras BS Degree Programme, has joined Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) as a Systems Engineer (Prime). He credits his training in Python, Data Science, Machine Learning, and Computational Thinking for building strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Hands-on projects like Business Data Management and Machine Learning helped him apply concepts to real-world problems, improving communication and teamwork. His journey highlights the importance of practical learning for industry readiness employability.

articles.title: PGCIL admit card 2026 released for DT, JOT and JTT posts at powergrid.in; exam on July 1, download here
articles.description: PGCIL admit card 2026: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has released the PGCIL Non Executive Admit Card 2026 for Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee and Junior Technician Trainee posts. Candidates can download hall tickets from powergrid.in ahead of the CBT scheduled on 1 July 2026. The recruitment drive covers over 660 vacancies across POWERGRID and CTUIL. The CBT will include 170 questions with negative marking, followed by skill test and medical examination stages.

articles.title: RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026 released at rbi.org.in, Phase 2 merit list PDF out for shortlisted candidates; download here
articles.description: RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026: The Reserve Bank of India has released the RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026 for Officer Grade B (General) recruitment under Panel Year 2026. The Phase 1 examination was held on June 13, 2026, and the result was declared on June 25, 2026. Shortlisted candidates will appear for Phase 2 on July 25, 2026. The merit list is available in PDF format on the official RBI website, with scorecards and cut-offs to follow separately.

articles.title: Welcome To The Jungle Movie Updates: Akshay, Suniel, Paresh return for laughter riot
articles.full_text: It read, "Finally the most awaited day has arrived! #WelcomeToTheJungle is getting positive and great reviews from all over.. Grab your tickets for the #MustWatch comedy film and enjoy with family and friends in cinemas near you! @SunielVShetty Sir @akshaykumar Sir @SirPareshRawalSir" His review read, "In terms of comedy…. Rank wise 1 - Akshay Kumar 2 - Jhony Lever 3 - Suniel Shetty 4 - Kiran Kumar 5 - Farida Jalal 6 - Rajpal Yadav 7 - Arshad Warsi Welcome To The Jungle…..Kya boltu publik" He posted on X, "I mean this with utmost sincerity There is a point where Akshay Kumar and Suniel Shetty are hogging film footage, trying to upstage each other in front of the villagers & it’s one of the funniest sequences I have seen this year in theatres." The IMDb synopsis of 'Welcome to the Jungle' read, "(The film) Follows a group of quirky characters gets stuck in a dangerous jungle during a chaotic mission. Filled with confusion, criminals, and hilarious situations, they must work together to survive and find their way out" Filmmaker Ahmed Khan, who has helmed movies like 'Fool N Final' (2007), 'Baaghi 2' (2018), 'Baaghi 3' (2020), and 'Heropanti 2', has directed the third installment of 'Welcome' franchise, 'Welcome to the Jungle'

articles.title: Priyanka: 'Wanted more work which had me as a lead'
articles.description: Priyanka Chopra shared insights into her Hollywood journey, emphasizing authenticity and evolution to maintain audience attention. She revealed that embracing mistakes and accepting imperfections has fostered a stronger emotional connection with fans. Chopra also spoke about her ambition, how rejection fuels her drive, and her proactive approach to breaking through industry "glass ceilings" by producing her own projects.
articles.full_text: The TOI Entertainment Desk is a dynamic and dedicated team of journalists, working tirelessly to bring the pulse of the entertainment world straight to the readers of The Times of India. articles.title: Prince William's "bolted shut" approach to Prince Harry revealed
articles.description: Reports suggest that Prince William has put in place rigorous limits for engaging with Prince Harry and Meghan Markle during their forthcoming visit to the UK, restricting their interactions solely to official public events. In contrast to King Charles, William's doors remain firmly closed, with private meetings ruled out. Sources suggest that William's sense of betrayal from Harry and Meghan's public comments makes any chance for reconciliation nearly impossible.

articles.title: SRK shares story behind famous childhood pic - WATCH
articles.description: Bollywood superstar Shah Rukh Khan charmed Mangaluru on June 25, sharing cherished childhood memories, including a famous photo of himself in a bucket. He expressed gratitude for the city's immense warmth and love. Khan also thrilled fans with energetic dance performances. His visit coincides with the final stages of shooting for his upcoming action-thriller 'King,' slated for a December 24 release, which features his daughter Suhana Khan.
